TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mulinaga, title = Mulinaga, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mulinaga} }

S.FORM: alang Mulinaga ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 53 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 45 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 85%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Mulinaga hya' ga Aljungic. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Mulinaga ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Mulinaga ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 53 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 45 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 85%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Mulinaga hya' ga Aljungic. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Mulinaga ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mulinaɣa ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na mulinaɣa ħjaʔ ɣa aljuŋiʦ~ʨ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ mulinaɣa ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
